Notice Of Motion To Re-Open Expert Discovery For The Limited Purpose Of Replacing Plaintiffs Expert, Dr. Herman Bruch, With Dr. Thomas Gourley And Allowing Plaintiff To Offer Him For Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael D. Levinson of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Henry Brown
Andrew O. Person of SEDGWICK LLP (415-781-7900), appearing for defendant / opposing party TOSCO Corporation
Lauren N. Peebles of BERRY & BERRY (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel
Vivy D. Dang of BASSI EDLIN HUIE & BLUM (415-403-4466), appearing for defendant Sequoia Ventures, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF HENRY BROWN'S MOTION TO RE-OPEN EXPERT DISCOVERY FOR THE LIMITED PURPOSE OF REPLACING PLAINTIFFS EXPERT, DR. HERMAN BRUCH, WITH DR. THOMAS GOURLEY AND ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO OFFER HIM FOR DEPOSITION

Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Plaintiff's motion to re-open expert discovery for the limited purpose of replacing plaintiff's expert Dr. Herman Bruch with Dr. Thomas Gourley and allowing plaintiff to offer him for deposition is granted. Plaintiff has until October 2, 2015 to produce Dr. Gourley for deposition. Defendants have until October 30 to review and amend their expert discovery. Trial date of Nov. 9, 2015 remains. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (Tel: 510-451-1580)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Henry Brown
Evanthia M. Spanos of BERRY & BERRY (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND RE-OPEN EXPERT DISCOVERY

No objections made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to continue the trial date and re-open expert discovery for the limited purpose of replacing plaintiff's expert Dr. Herman Bruch is granted. The trial date is continued to August 3, 2015 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Expert discovery is re-opened solely to allow the following: plaintiff may designate an expert in place of Dr. Bruch and such expert may prepare a report and be presented for deposition; if needed, defendants may supplement their expert witness designation limited to responding to plaintiff's new designation. Discovery is re-opened to allow any party to obtain plaintiff's updated medical records. This re-opened discovery closes on the new trial date. All other expert and fact discovery remains closed. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Continued To Aug-03-15 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Henry Brown

RULING:
DEFENDANT ALBAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration and Mr. Ay's declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (pipe insulation) attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to the declarations of plaintiff and Mr. Ay are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson,
Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion
